demographics.living_situation: lives at home with spouse; spouse present for the call

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: Every time I take a breath, it feels like a knife in my ribs, and my heart is hammering out of my chest.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The sharp chest pain came on suddenly about three hours ago and it's much worse when I breathe in or cough. My heart is racing and I feel like I can't get enough air.

symptom_narrative.character: sharp, stabbing chest pain, like a knife, worse on breathing in
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: severe — it stops me taking a full breath
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: in my ribs / side of the chest
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: there all the time, spikes when I breathe deeply or cough
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing really; taking shallow breaths hurts a bit less
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: taking a deep breath and coughing
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: my heart is racing and pounding, I'm breathing fast and feel short of air, and my right calf has been swollen and sore for a couple of days. When I walked to the bathroom just now I went lightheaded and nearly blacked out.
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm sitting up clutching my chest and taking quick shallow breaths; I can't move around without feeling faint

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: generally well, no ongoing health problems that I know of

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: just got back from a 14-hour international flight; the suitcases are still unpacked in the hallway. The calf swelling started over the two days since the flight.

objective_data_offered.value: oxygen level reads 92% on my finger clip
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single reading on a home fingertip pulse oximeter, patient anxious and breathing rapidly

objective_data_offered.value: my smartwatch says my heart rate is about 118
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: consumer wearable, not a medical-grade measurement

objective_data_offered.value: you can see the right calf is more swollen than the left; the patient is sweaty, looks distressed and is taking rapid shallow breaths, avoiding deep breaths
spouse says she went pale and nearly fainted walking to the bathroom, and she is clutching her chest and breathing really fast
